meaning: adj.鏈夌枒蹇冪殑,涓嶇浉淇＄殑
examples: I have no particular reason for doubting him.
There was no doubting the animal magnetism of the man.
We should develop the habit of doubting, and the ability to decide by ourselves.
There is no doubting the team have the ability in the mountains, albeit irregularly.
There is little doubting Mr Duncan Smith's resolve to press on with the shake-up.
